steps.title: Count the deposits by the end of week 4
steps.content: The account starts with 600 dollars at the beginning of week 1. Gabriella makes a 35-dollar deposit at the end of each week. From the end of week 1 through the end of week 4, there are exactly 4 deposits.

steps.title: Apply the linear formula to find the total
steps.content:
Amount equals the initial balance plus the sum of all deposits:
$$\text{Amount} = 600 + 4 \times 35$$
$$= 600 + 140$$
$$= 740$$
That matches Choice D — $740$.
